{{Quote|I hate to tell you this, but I think Huey needs to go into the Wastes to find a mate. It's about that time of year.|Windy Starkiller's father, to [[Windy Starkiller|his son]]|<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>}}
The '''father of [[Windy Starkiller]]''' lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with his [[Windy Starkiller's mother|wife]] and their son. He and his wife sometimes visited the [[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars homestead]].

{{Char-stub}}
